"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "Summary: The private IP blocklist regex used in the URL download feature does not match IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses (e.g. ::ffff:127.0.0.1), allowing SSRF protection to be bypassed on dual-stack systems. Affected components backend/src/applications/files/services/files-manager.service.ts – downloadFromUrl() checks regExpPrivateIP against request.socket.remoteAddress. backend/src/applications/files/utils/url-file.ts – regExpPrivateIP does not include ::ffff: variants. Details: The regExpPrivateIP regex in backend/src/applications/files/utils/url-file.ts correctly blocks standard IPv4 private ranges but does not include ::ffff: prefixed variants. On dual-stack systems, Node.js can report a socket's remoteAddress in IPv4-mapped IPv6 form, meaning the check in FilesManager.downloadFromUrl() can be bypassed entirely. PoC: [poc.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26990874/poc.pdf) Proof: Impact: An attacker can supply a crafted URL pointing to an internal address that gets reported as ::ffff:127.0.0.1 or ::ffff:10.x.x.x, causing the server to fetch internal resources that should be blocked. Any user with access to the file download feature is a potential attacker.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00221, "percentile": 0.1257}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q4x5-8cj6-52wg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:34:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q4x5-8cj6-52wg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q4x5-8cj6-52wg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47684"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T15:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:34:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Sync-in/server/security/advisories/GHSA-q4x5-8cj6-52wg", "https://github.com/Sync-in/server/releases/tag/v2.3.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47684", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q4x5-8cj6-52wg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Sync-in/server/security-advisories/GHSA-q4x5-8cj6-52wg", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Sync-in/server", "summary": "Sync-in Server: SSRF protection bypass via IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses in regExpPrivateIP", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-08T17:36:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q4x5-8cj6-52wg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.3.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@sync-in/server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.2.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Sync-in Server: SSRF protection bypass via IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses in regExpPrivateIP
